videos.title: SEE IT: Florida boat is giving brand new meaning to an ‘ice cream float'
videos.author: Fox News
videos.description: A Florida boat is giving brand new meaning to an ‘ice cream float.’ Video from Sarasota Bay shows the Tropicool Ice Cream boat cruising past boaters, offering packaged ice cream, drinks and snacks across local waterways. #fox #media #breakingnews #us #usa #new #news #breaking #foxnews #florida #sara
